name: Jefferson City (United States)

colors.symbolism: the upper half of the field
the lower half of the field

description: A horizontally divided field, red over blue, with a white circular roundel containing the city seal at the centre.
history: Used by the City of Jefferson, the capital of Missouri, founded in 1821 and named in honour of Thomas Jefferson.

features.role: Seal of the City of Jefferson
features.symbolism: The municipal seal of Jefferson City, capital of Missouri and named for U.S. President Thomas Jefferson.
